title: Cheboksary、Chuvashia — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Cheboksary、Chuvashia的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Cheboksary是Chuvashia的一个城市，人口约500,000。The capital of Chuvashia, a Volga River city with a unique Chuvash cultural heritage, modern hydroelectric plant, and scenic waterfront.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
